rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level signal routing bindings.
Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid AADL scopes corresponding to their semantic level.
Implementation-level bindings should reference subcomponents and connections within the implementation scope.
Assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes should not use implementation-only subcomponent paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Component type contracts should use visible feature names and relations for assumptions and guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level signal routing bindings in component type annexes.
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax and structure in annex blocks
Model analyst extraction of AADL components and features
